SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 EventLotteryRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.syntaxappproject.EventLotteryRepository
public class EventLotteryRepository extends Object
Repository class responsible for organizer-side lottery actions in Firebase Firestore for the SyntaxEvents application.

Handles sampling entrants from the wait list, sending winner notifications, sending not chosen notifications, and drawing replacement entrants. All operations are asynchronous and return results via callbacks.

Outstanding issues: this implementation keeps users on the wait list after sending notifications, and sends one notification document per action.

    说明
    static interface 
    EventLotteryRepository.LotteryActionCallback
    Callback interface for lottery actions that return a status message.
    static interface 
    EventLotteryRepository.SimpleCallback
    Callback interface for simple success/failure operations.

    • EventLotteryRepository

      public EventLotteryRepository()
      Constructs an EventLotteryRepository and initializes the Firestore instance.

    • EventLotteryRepository

      protected EventLotteryRepository(boolean testMode)
      Protected constructor for unit testing.

  • 方法详细资料

    • runLottery

      public void runLottery(String eventId, String eventName, int sampleSize, EventLotteryRepository.LotteryActionCallback callback)
      Runs the lottery for an event by sampling a specified number of entrants from the wait list.
      参数:
      eventId - the id of the event
      eventName - the name of the event
      sampleSize - the number of entrants to sample
      callback - callback reporting success/failure and a message

    • drawReplacement

      public void drawReplacement(String eventId, String eventName, EventLotteryRepository.LotteryActionCallback callback)
      Draws one replacement entrant from the wait list for the event.
      参数:
      eventId - the id of the event
      eventName - the name of the event
      callback - callback reporting success/failure and a message

    • removeInvitedUserFromEvent

      public void removeInvitedUserFromEvent(String eventId, String userId, EventLotteryRepository.SimpleCallback callback)
      Removes an invited user from the event document after they decline.
      参数:
      eventId - the id of the event
      userId - the user to remove from invited users
      callback - callback reporting success/failure
